title: HTML Introduction
content:
### What is HTML? **HTML** stands for **HyperText Markup Language**. It is the standard language for creating web pages. --- ### What Does HTML Do? - **Structure** web pages with headings, paragraphs, and sections - **Embed** images, videos, and links - **Create** forms for user input - **Define** the content layout of a website --- ### Key Points | Aspect | Description | |--------|-------------| | **Not a programming language** | It is a **markup** language | | **Uses tags** | Content is wrapped in `` | | **Browsers render it** | Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge | | **Works with CSS & JS** | CSS for style, JS for behavior | --- ### A Simple HTML Document ```html My Page

My First Heading

My first paragraph.

``` --- ### HTML Page Structure - `` -- tells the browser it is HTML5 - `` -- the root element - `` -- contains meta information (title, links) - `` -- contains visible content --- > **Fun Fact:** HTML was created by **Tim Berners-Lee** in **1991**. The current version is HTML5 (2014).
codeExample:
Hello, World!

This is my first HTML page.
